title: CloudVolume: a Python library for accessing Neuroglancer precomputed volumetric data
abstract: CloudVolume is a Python library for reading and writing Neuroglancer precomputed format volumetric datasets, enabling programmatic access to large-scale connectomics data stored in cloud object stores such as Google Cloud Storage and AWS S3.
notes: Software tool, not a traditional journal paper. CloudVolume is critical infrastructure used across many connectomics projects (FlyWire, MICrONS, etc.). Year is approximate for when the tool became widely adopted.
